# i18n DEAD-KEY baseline — generated by tool/audit/check_i18n_usage.dart (TOOLING_AUDIT T-001).
# Master keys with no reference found in mobile/lib. The follow-up SWEEP PR removes these
# keys from the locale JSONs and clears this file. `make i18n-usage` fails on any drift
# (a new dead key, or a key here that became used). Do NOT hand-edit except via the sweep.
